Off Calendar May-15-2025 Continued To Jul-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: COMPLIANCE HEARING.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court continues the matter for final compliance hearing to July 14, 2025 in Department 301. The settlement administrator or class counsel shall provide a declaration regarding settlement compliance by July 7, 2025. No appearances required.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Continued To May-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: COMPLIANCE HEARING.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
